user.title: Tasmota Timer Configuration
user.description: This integration provides services to configure Tasmota device timers via MQTT. No additional configuration is required - simply add the integration to enable the services.

init.title: Tasmota Timer Configuration Options
init.description: Configure options for the Tasmota Timer Configuration integration. Auto-discovery listens for Tasmota native discovery on tasmota/discovery/+/config, with fallback to tele/+/LWT and tele/+/STATE. You can also add device topics manually.
